programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Tulsi, 12, is airlifted to St George's after falling from a cliff near Hastings. Bus driver Adam, 39, faces lengthy emergency surgery after his motorbike collided with a car.

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: A selection of favourite investigations. Jimmy Doherty finds out what gives piquanté peppers their sweetness. Kate Quilton investigates potentially dangerous levels of mercury in tuna fish.

programme.title: Discover Must Have Ideas: Shopping
programme.desc: Discover the very latest must-haves for your home and garden with Must Have Ideas.

programme.title: Discover Must Have Ideas: Shopping
programme.desc: Discover the very latest must-haves for your home and garden with Must Have Ideas.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In the Cotswolds, Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien compete to see who can create the most profit on two old lamps, and take a spin in a Devonshire fire engine.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole finds a treat for restorer Guy, and Simon O'Brien creates stunning table lamps from old theatre lights.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Shelley and her mum Linda host first at their bargain B&B, The Five Bells, near Dover. But road noise disturbs some guests' sleep, and there's pricing confusion at breakfast.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Experienced hotelier Gez hosts at The Thomas Paine Hotel in Thetford. Sarah and Chris make a saucy discovery and competitive spirits are unleashed during a Home Guard training exercise.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Chris and Sarah hope that the factory next door won't detract from the charms of their historic pub, the Rose and Crown in Tenbury Wells. But Gez takes exception to the setting.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Lesley and Steve host at the Woodlands Guest House on Exmoor. Revenge is in the air for Shelley and Linda and, come feedback, the hosts realise that some of the group aren't playing fair.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's the final day of the competition and tensions run high as the B&Bers work through their issues, before the payments are revealed and the winner is announced.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Belgian-born hotel consultant Oli plans to wow his guests with his posh scallop starter, his meaty main and his loud, vivacious personality.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Glamorous nurse Jan serves up some good, honest home-cooking. But with three alpha males battling for attention, can Jan keep control of her evening.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Competitive events director and bodybuilding fanatic Zak serves up a complex menu, on a night featuring posing, party games and terrible tricks.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Aussie admin assistant Kimberley plans to host a sophisticated evening, and chastises one of her guests for telling rude stories. Can she keep the party civilised.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the last night, Paddy plays it safe with a simple menu featuring locally sourced, quality ingredients. Will it bag him the grand.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at Abbey House in Penrith, Cumbria, where Ian Sugden and his wife Sam treat their guests to an afternoon on the firing range and fancy bacon for breakfast.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Lisa Holloway prides herself on providing a home from home at Compton House in Newark, Nottinghamshire. But there are dusty discoveries, and Dave and Jo find the prices hard to swallow.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Dave and Jo Bate hope that their guests will embrace the pub vibe at The White Horse in Ripon, North Yorkshire. But Ed and Jane get locked in their room and it's 'tomatogate' at breakfast.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Former teachers Ed and Jane host at The Old Farmhouse in Cheshire. Some of their guests are surprised to be sharing a bathroom, and Sam and Ian are shocked by what's lurking under the bed.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&Bers meet for one last time to settle some scores and find out how much they've been paid. A heated exchange about cleaning leads to tears before the winner is announced.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil help more house-hunters make life-changing moves. In Northumberland, Lauren and Noel are set on character, while solo buyer Charlotte keeps getting outbid.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: On North Tyneside, Mark and Suze's emotional ties to their Victorian town house have left them in limbo. Kirstie has a great refurb plan, while Phil plays a wild card.

programme.title: Our Tiny Islands
programme.desc: The tales of remote island life return! From the four-legged taxi on the car-free island of Sark, to a trip to Inishcorkish - home to a special drift of pigs.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Cyclist Athar, who's 22, has collided with a car. Doctors assess whether he has sustained a serious head injury and life-changing damage to his neck, spine or internal organs.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Mel, who's 71, is rushed to St George's after being accidentally knocked down and run over by her husband, John. Maddi, who's four, has fallen and injured her neck on a train.

programme.title: Our Tiny Islands
programme.desc: The tales of remote island life return! From the four-legged taxi on the car-free island of Sark, to a trip to Inishcorkish - home to a special drift of pigs.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Cyclist Athar, who's 22, has collided with a car. Doctors assess whether he has sustained a serious head injury and life-changing damage to his neck, spine or internal organs.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Mel, who's 71, is rushed to St George's after being accidentally knocked down and run over by her husband, John. Maddi, who's four, has fallen and injured her neck on a train.

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: A selection of favourite investigations. Matt Tebbutt investigates oysters in China. Jimmy Doherty checks out London dry gin. Kate Quilton asks if herbal bedtime teas can help you nod off.

programme.title: Discover Must Have Ideas: Shopping
programme.desc: Discover the very latest must-haves for your home and garden with Must Have Ideas.

programme.title: Discover Must Have Ideas: Shopping
programme.desc: Discover the very latest must-haves for your home and garden with Must Have Ideas.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Max McMurdo head to Wales, where their picks include an oil dispenser, a fire grate, a chaise longue and a catamaran.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien find, fix and flog unwanted goods. This time, there's an old cheese press, and a 1980s motorbike almost gets the better of Henry and restorer Guy.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Charlotte and Lucy hope to impress their rivals with their quirky decor at Acqua Beach in Weymouth. But guest Derek upsets Charlotte with his comments on her design choices.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Derek and Lynne Love are all about keeping it simple at the Langmead Guest House in Ramsgate. But Charlotte and Lucy are mortified to find moths in the bed.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Adam and Susan host at their unconventional B&B, The Big Green Bus, in Lewes, where their guests are shocked to discover that they'll be spending the night on a converted double-decker.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The last visit of the week is to The Pheasant in Brill, Buckinghamshire, where fur flies as host and chef Stephen Orr reveals that he hasn't been entirely honest with his guests.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's the final day of the competition and the B&Bers meet for the last time to find out how much they've been paid and to settle some scores, before the winner is announced.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me Christmas
programme.desc: In this festive celebrity special, Rav Wilding hosts a not-very-Christmassy Mexican night for Rebecca Adlington, Jennifer Ellison, Alex Carter and SuperScrimpers' Mrs Moneypenny.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me Christmas
programme.desc: The festive celebrity special continues, as Rebecca Adlington hosts a Winter Games-themed evening for Rav Wilding, Jennifer Ellison, Alex Carter and Mrs Moneypenny.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me Christmas
programme.desc: Third to host this festive celebrity special is actor Jennifer Ellison, who plans a 'restaurant quality' evening with a singing waiter.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me Christmas
programme.desc: On the penultimate night of this festive celebrity special, former Hollyoaks and Emmerdale actor Alex Carter's curry receives mixed responses from his guests.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me Christmas
programme.desc: SuperScrimpers' Mrs Moneypenny hosts the final night with a traditional Christmas menu. But her choice of venison doesn't sit well with some guests, who refuse to tuck into Rudolph.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Fiona and John hope that their guests will embrace their green ethos at Knockaloe Beg Farm on the Isle of Man. Rivals Robbie and John are pleasantly surprised by the cleanliness.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Ex-demolition man Phil Routledge hopes to blow his guests away at the ultra-modern The Arches on the Isle of Man. But some of his high-tech gadgets leave them confused.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Can Robbie and John's traditional Blackpool B&B, The Trafford, impress their well-heeled rivals? The hosts try to sweeten the deal with a lesson in how to make Blackpool rock.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Empty-nester Julie Brogan welcomes her rivals to the grand Sheepy Lodge in Warwickshire, where she faces her worst fear: cooking poached eggs for her guests.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's the final day of the competition, and the rival B&Bers meet to settle some scores and to find out how much they've been paid - and who's won the week.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: We catch up with Kirsten and Scott in Fife, who've had multiple job and location moves across nine years. Have they finally put down roots? And did Digi find her passion project.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: In Albrighton, Jamie Lea and Curtis have reached a stalemate. Jamie Lea wants to settle down in their three-bed terrace, but Curtis is keen to find another project.

programme.title: Bill Bailey's Australian Adventure
programme.desc: In and around Perth, Bill samples a heady comedic cocktail of hip wineries, prison tunnels, gnomes and heavy metal jamming.

programme.title: Bill Bailey Live: Part Troll
programme.desc: The funniest bearded, babbling, bug-eyed druid the world has ever seen, captured in his natural habitat: the Hammersmith Apollo, during his sold-out comedy tour.

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics treat a woman who has taken drugs and is hallucinating at a hotel, a woman who has chest pains, and a child who is feverish and can't speak.

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics treat a man who's in cardiac arrest, a 16-year-old who has collapsed by a canal and a three-year-old who's struggling to breathe.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Independent 80-year-old Frances has fallen into her empty swimming pool. Jerry, who's 20, is starting to question partying until 5am on a weeknight after ending up in A&E.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Michelle, 54, is airlifted to St George's after being involved in a car crash with her husband Paul. Derren, 41, has fractured his ankle while trampolining with his daughter.

programme.title: Discover Must Have Ideas: Shopping
programme.desc: Discover the very latest must-haves for your home and garden with Must Have Ideas.
